Hi, I believe I added travel insurance to my flight reservation, but it’s not showing up when I check online. My reservation number is PEP4E0. Could you please look into this for me?

I have checked your reservation details, and it appears that travel insurance was not added to your flight reservation with the number PEP4E0. If you believe there has been an error, we can certainly look into this further. Would you like me to investigate how this might have happened or assist you in adding travel insurance now?

I definitely recall adding the insurance, and it’s important to me because everyone else in my family has it for our trip. Can you please add the insurance to my reservation right now? I don’t want to be transferred to another agent.

I understand the importance of this for you, and I'll make sure to add the travel insurance to your reservation. Let's proceed with updating your reservation to include the insurance.

Could you please confirm the amount you would like to pay for the insurance? Typically, the cost is around $20 per person, but I'll need your confirmation before proceeding.
If you agree, I will update your reservation to include the insurance and charge the same credit card that was used for the original booking.
